steps.t: Captured Dourhands can be found at Sadauk-kala in western Máttugard. You should free the captured Dourhands.
Captured Dourhands can be found at Sadauk-kala in western Máttugard. You should free the captured Dourhands.
The freed Dourhands can be found near Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to one of the freed Dourhands.
Stolen supplies can be found at Sadauk-kala in Máttugard. You should recover the stolen supplies.
The freed Dourhands can be found near Steepset in Máttugard. You should bring the supplies to one of the freed Dourhands.
